title: stellaria media var. procera
intro: Stellaria media var. procera, commonly known as tall chickweed, is a perennial plant species within the Stellaria media genus. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation in the body. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Tall chickweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other infections.
